---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or enhancement"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## ⚠️ Mission Alignment Check

> New features must align with the educational/research mission of CaptchaIQ Platform.
> Features that could enable malicious automation will not be accepted.

- [ ] This feature is intended for educational, research, or accessibility purposes
- [ ] This feature does not enable unauthorized access to third-party systems

---

## Feature Summary

**One-line summary of the feature:**

---

## Problem Statement

**What problem does this feature solve? What is the current pain point?**

---

## Proposed Solution

**Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.**

---

## Alternative Approaches

**Describe alternatives you've considered.**

---

## Use Case

**Walk through a concrete scenario where this feature would be used:**

```
Example: A researcher studying hCaptcha wants to automatically classify 
challenge type (image selection vs. text) so they can route to the 
appropriate analysis pipeline...
```

---

## Research / References

**Link to relevant papers, existing implementations, or prior art:**

---

## Implementation Notes (optional)

**If you have technical ideas about implementation:**

---

## Priority

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important for research workflow
- [ ] Critical / blocking research

## Additional Context

Any mockups, diagrams, or additional context.
